ItacPersonItem.Notes: Secretary of Filippo Colonna. In 1638, Garopoli presented the poem "E quali, o grand`Antonio, ardono il mondo" to the Infecondi, on the occasion of the academic reunion organized by Cardinal Antonio Barberini to celebrate the birth of the French heir to the throne, Louis XIV. See L. Spera, `Garopoli, Girolamo,`, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
